ipc_sections_reference.description: Reference index of IPC sections cited across all candidate affidavits

sections.title: Unlawful Assembly
sections.description: Being a member of an unlawful assembly of 5 or more persons with a common object to commit an offence.
sections.max_punishment: 6 months imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Joining Unlawful Assembly Armed with Deadly Weapon
sections.description: Joining or continuing in unlawful assembly while armed with any deadly weapon.
sections.max_punishment: 2 years imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Rioting
sections.description: Committing rioting, i.e., use of force or violence by an unlawful assembly.
sections.max_punishment: 2 years imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Rioting Armed with Deadly Weapon
sections.description: Rioting while armed with a deadly weapon or anything that can be used as a weapon.
sections.max_punishment: 3 years imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Promoting Enmity Between Groups
sections.description: Promoting disharmony or feelings of enmity, hatred or ill-will between different religious, racial or linguistic groups.
sections.max_punishment: 3 years imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Disobedience to Order of Public Servant
sections.description: Disobeying an order promulgated by a public servant causing obstruction or annoyance.
sections.max_punishment: 1 month imprisonment or fine of Rs.200 or both

sections.title: Negligent Act Likely to Spread Infection of Disease
sections.description: Negligently doing any act known to be likely to spread infection of any disease dangerous to life.
sections.max_punishment: 6 months imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Obscene Acts and Songs
sections.description: Committing any obscene act in a public place causing annoyance to others.
sections.max_punishment: 3 months imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Punishment for Murder
sections.description: Committing murder — the intentional killing of a person.
sections.max_punishment: Death or life imprisonment and fine

sections.title: Culpable Homicide Not Amounting to Murder
sections.description: Causing death by doing an act with the intention of causing death or bodily injury likely to cause death.
sections.max_punishment: Life imprisonment or 10 years imprisonment and fine

sections.title: Attempt to Murder
sections.description: Doing any act with intention or knowledge that if the act caused death, it would amount to murder.
sections.max_punishment: 10 years imprisonment and fine; life imprisonment if hurt caused

sections.title: Voluntarily Causing Hurt
sections.description: Voluntarily causing hurt to another person not amounting to grievous hurt.
sections.max_punishment: 1 year imprisonment or fine of Rs.1,000 or both

sections.title: Voluntarily Causing Hurt by Dangerous Weapons
sections.description: Voluntarily causing hurt using any instrument for shooting, stabbing or cutting or by fire or heated substance.
sections.max_punishment: 3 years imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Voluntarily Causing Grievous Hurt
sections.description: Voluntarily causing grievous hurt to another person.
sections.max_punishment: 7 years imprisonment and fine

sections.title: Punishment for Wrongful Restraint
sections.description: Voluntarily obstructing a person to prevent them from proceeding in any direction they have a right to go.
sections.max_punishment: 1 month imprisonment or fine of Rs.500 or both

sections.title: Assault or Criminal Force to Deter Public Servant
sections.description: Assaulting or using criminal force to any person being a public servant in discharge of his duty.
sections.max_punishment: 2 years imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Assault or Criminal Force on Woman
sections.description: Assaulting or using criminal force on any woman intending to outrage her modesty.
sections.max_punishment: 1 to 5 years imprisonment and fine

sections.title: Rape
sections.description: Sexual intercourse with a woman against her will or without consent under any of the stipulated circumstances.
sections.max_punishment: 10 years to life imprisonment and fine

sections.title: Theft
sections.description: Committing theft — moving of property with dishonest intention.
sections.max_punishment: 3 years imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Extortion
sections.description: Putting a person in fear of injury to dishonestly induce delivery of property or valuable security.
sections.max_punishment: 3 years imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Robbery
sections.description: Committing theft or extortion accompanied by force or threat of force.
sections.max_punishment: 10 years imprisonment and fine; 14 years on highway or night

sections.title: Dacoity
sections.description: Committing dacoity — robbery by five or more persons.
sections.max_punishment: Life imprisonment or 10 years rigorous imprisonment and fine

sections.title: Criminal Breach of Trust
sections.description: Committing criminal breach of trust — dishonest misappropriation of property entrusted.
sections.max_punishment: 3 years imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Cheating
sections.description: Cheating any person by deception, inducing them to deliver property or cause harm.
sections.max_punishment: 1 year imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Cheating and Dishonestly Inducing Delivery of Property
sections.description: Cheating and thereby dishonestly inducing the person deceived to deliver property or to alter or destroy any signed document.
sections.max_punishment: 7 years imprisonment and fine

sections.title: Mischief Causing Damage
sections.description: Committing mischief and causing loss or damage to the amount of Rs.50 or more.
sections.max_punishment: 2 years imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Mischief by Fire or Explosive Substance
sections.description: Committing mischief by fire or explosive substance with intent to destroy a house, place of worship or other property.
sections.max_punishment: Life imprisonment or 10 years imprisonment and fine

sections.title: Criminal Trespass
sections.description: Entering or remaining on property in possession of another with intent to commit an offence or to intimidate, insult or annoy.
sections.max_punishment: 3 months imprisonment or fine of Rs.500 or both

sections.title: Forgery
sections.description: Making a false document or electronic record with intent to cause damage or injury to the public or any person.
sections.max_punishment: 2 years imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Using Forged Document as Genuine
sections.description: Fraudulently or dishonestly using as genuine any document known to be forged.
sections.max_punishment: 2 years imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Defamation
sections.description: Making or publishing any imputation concerning a person with intent to harm reputation.
sections.max_punishment: 2 years imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Punishment for Defamation
sections.description: Defaming any person through spoken, written, or published means.
sections.max_punishment: 2 years imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Statements Conducive to Public Mischief
sections.description: Making, publishing or circulating statements likely to cause public mischief or incite to offence against the State.
sections.max_punishment: 3 years imprisonment or fine or both

sections.title: Criminal Intimidation
sections.description: Threatening another person with injury to person, reputation or property with intent to cause alarm.
sections.max_punishment: 2 years imprisonment or fine or both; 7 years if threat of death/grievous hurt

sections.title: Word, Gesture Intended to Insult Modesty of a Woman
sections.description: Uttering any word, making any sound or gesture intending that such word or sound is heard or gesture is seen by a woman.
sections.max_punishment: 3 years imprisonment or fine or both

special_acts_reference.description: Non-IPC special acts cited in candidate affidavits

acts.description: Punishment for contravening provisions regarding acquisition, possession, or carrying of arms or ammunition.
acts.max_punishment: 3 years imprisonment or fine or both; 7 years in aggravated cases

acts.description: Punishment for use of arms or ammunition in contravention of the Act.
Public servant taking gratification other than legal remuneration in respect of an official act.
acts.max_punishment: 6 months to 5 years imprisonment and fine

acts.description: Criminal misconduct by a public servant — possession of disproportionate assets.

acts.act: TNDA (Tamil Nadu District Authorities Act) — Section 3
acts.description: Detention of persons threatening public order or maintenance of supplies essential to the community.
Detention of goondas, bootleggers, drug offenders, etc., to prevent them from acting in a manner prejudicial to public order.

acts.act: Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances (NDPS) Act — Section 20
acts.description: Punishment for contravention in relation to cannabis plant and cannabis.
acts.max_punishment: 6 months to 20 years rigorous imprisonment and fine depending on quantity

acts.description: Punishment for contravention in relation to manufactured drugs and preparations.
acts.max_punishment: 1 to 20 years rigorous imprisonment and fine depending on quantity

acts.description: Promoting enmity between classes in connection with elections.
acts.max_punishment: 3 years imprisonment or fine or both

acts.description: Removal of ballot papers from polling stations.
acts.max_punishment: 1 year imprisonment or fine or both

acts.description: Unlawful manufacture, possession, use, sale, transport or import of explosives.
Computer related offences — dishonestly or fraudulently doing any act.
acts.max_punishment: 3 years imprisonment and fine up to Rs.5 lakh

acts.description: Punishment for offences of atrocities committed against members of Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes.
